name: CMP_COMPONENTS_VL
query: SELECT B.COMPONENT_ID, B.PLAN_ID, B.PERIOD_ID, B.CURRENCY_DETERMINATION_CODE, B.SYSTEM_ORDER_NUM, B.ORDER_NUM, B.POOL_ID_TO_CONSUME, B.POST_AS_SALARY_FLAG, B.SALARY_COMPONENT, B.RULE_ID, B.GRANT_TYPE, B.TRADING_SYMBOL, B.NON_MONETARY_UOM, B.COMP_TYPE, T.COMPONENT_NAME, T.PLAN_ID PLAN_ID2, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.SALARY_RATES_USED_FLAG, B.USE_FOR_ASG_SEG_FLAG, B.ASG_SEG_AUTO_PUBLISH_FLAG, B.ASG_SEG_WS_COLUMN_CODE, B.MANAGER_ENTER_RATES_CODE, B.SALARY_SMPL_COMP_USED_FLAG, B.DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, B.DOR_REQUIRED_FLAG, B.STOCK_DEFAULTING_CODE FROM CMP_COMPONENTS_B B, CMP_COMPONENTS_TL T WHERE B.COMPONENT_ID = T.COMPONENT_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.PLAN_ID = T.PLAN_ID AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
